title: Modern Villa in Polanco
description: Stunning modern villa in the heart of Polanco, Mexico City's most prestigious neighborhood. Features floor-to-ceiling windows, a rooftop terrace, and premium finishes throughout.

title: Beachfront Condo in Tulum
description: Wake up to the sound of waves in this stunning beachfront condo. Direct beach access, infinity pool, and breathtaking views of the Caribbean Sea.

title: Colonial Home in San Miguel
description: A beautifully restored colonial home in the UNESCO World Heritage city of San Miguel de Allende. Original stonework, courtyard garden, and rooftop views of the iconic Parroquia.

title: Luxury Penthouse in Monterrey
description: Top floor penthouse with panoramic views of the Sierra Madre mountains. Private pool, smart home system, and direct access to Monterrey's best dining and entertainment.

title: Craftsman Home in Austin
description: Charming craftsman home in the heart of Austin, minutes from South Congress. Original hardwood floors, updated kitchen, large backyard perfect for entertaining.

title: Modern Condo in Miami Beach
description: Sleek and modern condo just steps from Miami Beach. Floor-to-ceiling windows, resort-style amenities, and stunning ocean views from the 18th floor.

title: Spanish Bungalow in Los Angeles
description: Iconic Spanish bungalow in Silver Lake with original arched doorways, terracotta tile roof, and a lush private garden. Walkable to the best cafes and boutiques in LA.

title: Loft in New York City
description: Stunning Soho loft with exposed brick, original cast iron columns, and 12-foot ceilings. Recently renovated kitchen and bathrooms while preserving the historic industrial character.

title: Eco Villa in Oaxaca
description: Sustainable eco villa built with traditional Oaxacan materials. Solar panels, rainwater collection, organic garden, and sweeping views of the valley and Monte Albán ruins.

title: Townhouse in Chicago
description: Elegant brick townhouse in Lincoln Park, one of Chicago's most sought-after neighborhoods. Private rooftop deck, attached garage, and walking distance to the lakefront.

title: Jungle Retreat in Puerto Vallarta
description: Surrounded by lush jungle with ocean views, this private retreat offers the perfect blend of nature and luxury. Infinity pool, outdoor shower, and direct access to a hidden beach.

title: Historic Brownstone in Boston
description: Magnificent 19th century brownstone on Beacon Hill, one of Boston's most historic and picturesque neighborhoods. Original fireplaces, bay windows, and a private garden courtyard.
